About.title: About Me
About.description: Frontend Developer with more than 5 years of professional experience in banking and corporate environments, specializing in JavaScript, React, Next.js, and TypeScript. In my current role, I primarily perform frontend responsibilities and also contribute to Full Stack tasks with Python and Django, including views, services, configurations, and business logic. Additional experience with Node.js, REST APIs, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Git, Docker, and CI/CD.

experience.title: Confidential Company
achievements: Develop and maintain highly complex internal web applications with Next.js, React, JavaScript, and TypeScript for critical business processes.
Build reusable components, views, and user flows with a focus on scalability, security, performance, and long-term maintainability.
Contribute occasionally to backend development with Python and Django, implementing and maintaining views, services, configurations, and business logic.
Integrate the frontend with internal services and REST APIs, collaborating with cross-functional teams through code reviews, Git, and CI/CD processes.

experience.title: Indra
achievements: Developed and maintained frontend features for digital banking products using JavaScript, Web Components, and CELLS.
Implemented unit and E2E tests with Jest, Jasmine, Chai, and Cucumber.
Automated integration and deployment with Jenkins, Docker, and GitHub Enterprise, applying Scrum and Gitflow.
Earned CELLS and Secure Development certifications, applying security best practices throughout the development lifecycle.

experience.title: Endava
achievements: Developed a customer management platform for CoignCard with JavaScript, React, Redux, and React Router, focused on a clear and maintainable user experience.

experience.title: Sophos Solutions
achievements: Developed a web application for Tuya S.A. to automatically assign credit limits, using TypeScript, Angular, HTML5, and CSS3.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.subtitle: Weekend projects for fun only (no commercial use).
Portfolio.description: My passion lies in bringing captivating and user-friendly digital experiences to life. As a frontend developer, my focus is on creating interactive and responsive interfaces that combine technical skills with engaging design. My portfolio reflects my commitment to excellence in web development, highlighting projects where creativity meets functionality to deliver memorable web experiences. From implementing responsive designs to optimizing performance, my goal is to use the latest technologies and standards to drive impactful and immersive projects that delight users and solve challenges effectively.
